input.target_audience: CTOs and VPs of Engineering at Series B+ SaaS companies with active engineering hiring

campaign_structure.bidding_strategy: Manual CPC (first 30 days to accumulate conversion data, then switch to Target CPA at $200 target)

ad_groups.name: Developer Onboarding — Branded Category
ad_groups.theme: Explicit category searches — prospects who know the solution category exists

ad_groups.name: Internal Developer Portal — Adjacent Intent
ad_groups.theme: Searches for related infrastructure that DevOnboard solves

ad_groups.name: Reduce Engineering Ramp Time — Problem Aware
ad_groups.theme: Searches that signal awareness of the problem but not the solution category

pinned_headlines: Position 2 (Value): First Commit in 3 Days (22 chars)
Position 3 (CTA/Proof): Free Trial — Carta Cut Ramp 65% (32 chars)
descriptions: Automate engineer onboarding end-to-end. Connect GitHub, Jira, Confluence — new hires hit their first PR in 3 days, not 3 weeks. No DevEx team required.
Carta reduced engineer time-to-productivity by 65%. Plaid runs 20 hires/month with zero dedicated DevEx headcount. Try free — 14-day trial, no credit card.

quality_score_optimizations: Ensure landing page headline 'First commit in 3 days' matches ad headlines for message relevance
Add target keywords naturally in page body copy (developer onboarding, engineer onboarding automation)
Page load speed target <2s — technical audience has zero tolerance for slow pages
Add 'developer onboarding' as H1 on landing page for keyword relevance signal
launch_sequence: Week 1: Launch with Manual CPC, all 3 ad groups active, conservative bids ($2-4 CPC for branded, $3-5 for problem-aware)
Week 2: Review search term reports daily — add negatives from irrelevant queries
Week 3: Pause keywords with >50 impressions and 0 clicks; increase bids on keywords driving clicks
Week 4+: Once 15+ trial signups accumulated, switch to Target CPA bidding at $200
Month 2: If branded category ad group CPL <$200, increase budget by 30% and test Phrase Match expansion
output.estimated_cpc_range: $3-7 CPC for developer onboarding category (less competitive than sales tech). Expected CTR 3-5% for exact match. Trial signup conversion rate 8-12% from paid search traffic.
